# Account Move Propagate Ref

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to copy the reference when reversing an accounting move and
creating a new draft one.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_move_propagate_ref.models.account_move.AccountMove.copy_data
documentation:
Add `ref` to copied fields

The same feature could've been achieved by setting `copy=True` in
the field's definition, but it would've made the field copiable
everywhere.
Instead, we just need to copy it when reversing a move and creating a
new one from it, which is done by calling {meth}`copy_data`.

documentation: Tests that ref is not passed from entry to reversal move
